summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GitStack SaaS major improvements. All 6 requested features are fully functional: trending repos with AI translation, comprehensive GitHub repo detail pages, real founder stacks without fake copy counts, working Dead Tool Detector share functionality, Browse by Topic filtering, and real GitHub star counts throughout.

design_issues.issue: Clipboard permission error in browser console (expected in automated testing)

passed_tests: Trending repos click opens detail page with AI translation (not just GitHub redirect)
GitHub repo detail page shows comprehensive AI translation: What it does, Who it's for, What you can build, Setup steps, Replaces X
Founder stacks show real star counts (28k for Cal.com) and 'View on GitHub' links
Founder stacks have NO fake copy counts - removed successfully
Dead Tool Detector share button copies real text with savings amount ($36,213/yr)
Browse by Topic shows different tools per category (AI Agents vs UI/UX Tools)
All star counts are from real GitHub data (19,866 stars, 1,856 forks verified)
AI integrations processing correctly with proper response times
Navigation and routing working correctly across all pages
Real-time GitHub trending data loading successfully
